hooks.command: if python3 -c "import sys" >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 "$CODEBUDDY_PROJECT_DIR/.codebuddy/hooks/record-discovery-action.py" || exit 2; elif python -c "import sys" >/dev/null 2>&1; then python "$CODEBUDDY_PROJECT_DIR/.codebuddy/hooks/record-discovery-action.py" || exit 2; else echo 'CodeBuddy discovery recorder: Python interpreter unavailable' >&2; exit 2; fi
